name: etechflow/module-supplier-autoflow
description: Magento 2 module that auto-toggles supplier active flags based on stock and reprices products from the first-active supplier's cost × markup. Built for stores with multi-supplier products and dynamic supplier-driven pricing. Pairs cleanly with ETechFlow Next Day Eligibility — when a supplier flips, NDE re-evaluates next-day eligibility automatically.

suggest.etechflow/module-next-day-eligibility: When installed, Autoflow's supplier active-flag changes automatically trigger NDE to recompute next_day_eligible — keeps shipping eligibility in sync with the supplier that's actually fulfilling the order.
suggest.magento/module-inventory-api: When MSI is enabled, Autoflow can use per-source stock as the auto-toggle trigger. Soft-detected — module installs and works without MSI.
